# CWE-425: restricted admin export reachable without authorization.
lang: go
file: CWE-425-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"github.com/jmoiron/sqlx"
)

func MountAdminExports(r *gin.Engine, db *sqlx.DB) {
	r.GET("/internal/admin/export.csv", func(c *gin.Context) {
		rows, err := db.Queryx("SELECT email, ssn FROM customers")
		if err != nil {
			c.String(http.StatusInternalServerError, err.Error())
			return
		}
		defer rows.Close()
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, rows)
	})
}
